what_is_working: Twitter agent is successfully posting content
Quora agent is generating answer drafts based on latest video topics
Trend Scout agent is functioning without errors
what_needs_improvement: Analytics agent is reporting incorrect data
Revenue Tracker agent is predicting an unrealistic time to monetization
Competitor Spy and SEO Optimizer agents are failing to update correctly
urgent_actions: Resolve Competitor Spy and SEO Optimizer agent failures

fix_instructions.Analytics: Check Google Analytics API connection and ensure correct view ID is being used. Verify that API credentials are up-to-date and properly configured in the agent's settings.
fix_instructions.Revenue Tracker: Review YouTube Partner Program (YPP) requirements and adjust predictions based on actual earnings and subscriber growth. Ensure accurate calculation of required watch hours and subscribers.
fix_instructions.Competitor Spy: Update competitor video analysis API to handle changes in video metadata
fix_instructions.SEO Optimizer: Review SEO updates applied and investigate why they are not being effective. Check for any changes in YouTube's algorithm that may require adjustments to SEO strategies.
fix_instructions.Instagram: Instagram agent is missing INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN in GitHub Secrets → go to Settings → Secrets → add it
